---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug or unexpected behavior in the project
title: "[BUG]: "

---

## 🐞 Bug Report

### 📌 Description
Provide a clear and concise description of the bug.

---

### 🔄 Steps to Reproduce
Steps to reproduce the issue:

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Perform '...'
4. Observe the error

---

### ✅ Expected Behavior
Describe what you expected to happen.

---

### ❌ Actual Behavior
Describe what actually happened instead.

---

### 📷 Screenshots / Recordings
If applicable, add screenshots or screen recordings to help explain the issue.

---

### 📋 Additional Context
Add any additional context, logs, console errors, or information here.

---

### 🛠️ Possible Solution
If you have suggestions on a fix for the bug, describe them here.

---
